name: SQL injection via string interpolation
description: Tests whether the reviewer catches SQL query construction using f-string interpolation instead of parameterized queries.

expected_findings.description: search_users constructs a SQL query using f-string interpolation with unsanitized user input. The query variable is built as f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%{query}%'" which is a classic SQL injection vector.

expected_clean.description: Adding a role field to the User model — straightforward data model extension with no bugs
